name: compute_labor_burden
description: Computes fully burdened labor cost for a hospitality property or department. Breaks total cost into three components: base wages, employer benefits load (health, retirement, PTO, workers' comp), and employer statutory payroll taxes (FICA/FUTA/state UI in the US; social security + unemployment equivalents for ES/IT/GR). Returns per-FTE and aggregate costs plus the effective burden rate above base wages.

base_wage_per_fte.description: Annual base wage per full-time equivalent employee in local currency

fte_count.description: Number of full-time equivalent employees (may be fractional)

benefits_load_rate.description: Employer benefits cost as decimal of base wages (e.g. 0.22 = 22% for health + retirement + PTO + workers' comp)

employer_payroll_tax_rate.description: Employer statutory payroll tax rate as decimal (e.g. 0.0765 US FICA, 0.255 ES, 0.30 IT). Max 0.50.

periods_per_year.description: Number of periods per year for per-period cost breakdown (default 1 = annual; use 12 for monthly)
